src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID is a serial persistent field and must be annotated with @Serial in Java 17+ if the class implements Serializable.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID in a serializable class must be annotated with @Serial in Java 17+.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Import java.io.Serial to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol class Serial.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Java 17+ enforces that serialVersionUID fields in serializable classes must be annotated with @Serial (or be effectively final and private static final long) to avoid compile-time errors when using strict serialization checks or specific compiler flags enabled in newer JDKs.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ module system restrictions on serializable fields.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compilation error: 'serialVersionUID' is not accessible from module java.base (or similar module access error) because the field is in a different module than java.io.Serializable and lacks the @Serial annotation required since Java 14.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Update web.xml namespace and schema location from Java EE to Jakarta EE to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x runs on Jakarta EE 9+ which uses the 'jakarta.*' namespace; using the old 'java.sun.com' namespace causes deployment failures or class loading errors as the container expects Jakarta annotations and descriptors.
